subject: Did you miss the live event? (Replay inside)
body:
Mozination –

As promised here is the replay from the $100M Leads Live event yesterday.

You can watch it right here

Alex

PS - I can't guarantee hardbacks will be available for much longer.

For context:

We sold out of 2/3rds of the physical books in the first 20 minutes.

This email is now going out to over 533,276 people. If there are any books left, now would be the best time.

Click here to claim one before they officially go
